Retail Demand Forecasting and Inventory Dashboard

Project Summary

  • Retail Demand Forecasting and Inventory Optimization Project
  • Rows analysed: 5034
  • Date range: 2013-01-02 to 2017-08-15
  • Store count: 1
  • Families: BEVERAGES, DAIRY, GROCERY I
  • Training rows: 4680
  • Testing rows: 270
  • Best model by RMSE: linear_regression_lags
  • Advanced model hooks prepared for ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM when the required libraries are installed.

Model Comparison

model mae rmse mape
linear_regression_lags 229.492 290.328 17.860
prophet 204.624 311.009 14.123
seasonal_naive 231.963 405.221 13.945
arima 318.317 496.427 24.793
moving_average_7 351.614 525.614 27.159
